text: Impoundment of a motor vehicle under this subchapter is in addition to any other punishment imposed under this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.264 — Penalties Cumulative

Impoundment of a motor vehicle under this subchapter is in addition to any other punishment imposed under this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Impoundment of a motor vehicle under this subchapter is in addition to any other punishment imposed under this chapter.
